name: mdopendata-spatial-knowledge
description: Inventory and schema scaffolding for an mdopendata spatial land-use and municipal-business datastore.

scripts.db:up: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:DOCKER_CONFIG=(Join-Path (Get-Location) '.docker-local'); New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $env:DOCKER_CONFIG | Out-Null; docker compose up -d postgis"
scripts.db:down: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:DOCKER_CONFIG=(Join-Path (Get-Location) '.docker-local'); New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $env:DOCKER_CONFIG | Out-Null; docker compose down"
scripts.db:logs: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:DOCKER_CONFIG=(Join-Path (Get-Location) '.docker-local'); New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $env:DOCKER_CONFIG | Out-Null; docker compose logs postgis"
scripts.web:up: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:DOCKER_CONFIG=(Join-Path (Get-Location) '.docker-local'); New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $env:DOCKER_CONFIG | Out-Null; docker compose up -d web"
scripts.web:logs: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:DOCKER_CONFIG=(Join-Path (Get-Location) '.docker-local'); New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $env:DOCKER_CONFIG | Out-Null; docker compose logs web"
scripts.db:check: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:DOCKER_CONFIG=(Join-Path (Get-Location) '.docker-local'); New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $env:DOCKER_CONFIG | Out-Null; $database=if($env:PGDATABASE){$env:PGDATABASE}else{'mdopendata'}; $user=if($env:PGUSER){$env:PGUSER}else{'mdopendata'}; docker exec mdopendata-postgis psql -U $user -d $database -c '\dt'"
scripts.db:apply-schema: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:DOCKER_CONFIG=(Join-Path (Get-Location) '.docker-local'); New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $env:DOCKER_CONFIG | Out-Null; $database=if($env:PGDATABASE){$env:PGDATABASE}else{'mdopendata'}; $user=if($env:PGUSER){$env:PGUSER}else{'mdopendata'}; Get-Content (Join-Path (Get-Location) 'schema/sql/postgis.sql') | docker exec -i mdopendata-postgis psql -U $user -d $database"
